texts.orig: MADARAKA EXPRESS PACKAGE

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 2025 Train Package - Nairobi-Voi & Mombasa-Voi Routes
texts.text: 2025 Train Package - Nairobi-Voi & Mombasa-Voi Routes

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Located at the main entrance to the Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary, Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa welcomes guests with its inviting stone building comprising 59 spacious Resort Rooms and 2 Executive Suites, each boasting a private viewing balcony for an immersive safari experience.
texts.text: Located at the main entrance to the Taita Hills Wildlife Sanctuary, Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa welcomes guests with its inviting stone building comprising 59 spacious Resort Rooms and 2 Executive Suites, each boasting a private viewing balcony for an immersive safari experience.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Resort holds historical significance as a heritage-built German fortress during World War 1, adding a unique dimension to its character. Visitors can explore this rich history through a museum onsite, which proudly displays World War 1 memorabilia, offering insights into the heritage of Taita Taveta County.
texts.text: The Resort holds historical significance as a heritage-built German fortress during World War 1, adding a unique dimension to its character. Visitors can explore this rich history through a museum onsite, which proudly displays World War 1 memorabilia, offering insights into the heritage of Taita Taveta County.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: ONE NIGHT PACKAGE!
texts.text: ONE NIGHT PACKAGE!

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The One Night Package at Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa offers an all-inclusive experience combining accommodation, meals, transport, game drives, and a unique cultural visit. Here's a detailed breakdown of what the package includes:
texts.text: The One Night Package at Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa offers an all-inclusive experience combining accommodation, meals, transport, game drives, and a unique cultural visit. Here's a detailed breakdown of what the package includes:

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: PACKAGE DETAILS:
texts.text: PACKAGE DETAILS:

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Accommodation & Meals
texts.text: Accommodation & Meals

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · One Night Full-Board Accommodation : Enjoy a comfortable stay with all meals included (breakfast, lunch, and dinner).
texts.text: One Night Full-Board Accommodation : Enjoy a comfortable stay with all meals included (breakfast, lunch, and dinner).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All-Day Drinking Water : Complimentary drinking water available throughout your stay.
texts.text: All-Day Drinking Water : Complimentary drinking water available throughout your stay.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Transport
texts.text: Transport

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Return 1st Class Train Tickets : Travel in comfort with first-class train tickets for your journey to and from Voi.
texts.text: Return 1st Class Train Tickets : Travel in comfort with first-class train tickets for your journey to and from Voi.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Return Transfers in Voi : Private transfers from the Voi train station to the resort and back.
texts.text: Return Transfers in Voi : Private transfers from the Voi train station to the resort and back.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Activities
texts.text: Activities

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Two Game Drives : Experience wildlife up close with two scheduled game drives in the sanctuary.
texts.text: Two Game Drives : Experience wildlife up close with two scheduled game drives in the sanctuary.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Sanctuary Entry Fees : All necessary entry fees to the sanctuary are covered.
texts.text: Sanctuary Entry Fees : All necessary entry fees to the sanctuary are covered.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · WW1 Talk & Artifacts Museum Visit : Engage in a historical World War I talk and explore the artifacts museum at the resort.
texts.text: WW1 Talk & Artifacts Museum Visit : Engage in a historical World War I talk and explore the artifacts museum at the resort.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Taita Hills Wildlife Education Centre to learn more about wildlife conservation at the resort.
texts.text: Taita Hills Wildlife Education Centre to learn more about wildlife conservation at the resort.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Arrival & Check-in : After your first-class train journey to Voi, you'll be transferred to the Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa.
texts.text: Arrival & Check-in : After your first-class train journey to Voi, you'll be transferred to the Taita Hills Safari Resort & Spa.

texts.text: Lunch : Enjoy a hearty lunch at the resort.

texts.orig: · Game Drive : Embark on your first game drive to explore the local wildlife.
texts.text: Game Drive : Embark on your first game drive to explore the local wildlife.

texts.orig: · Dinner : Return to the resort for dinner.
texts.text: Dinner : Return to the resort for dinner.

texts.orig: · WW1 Talk & Museum Visit : Attend the talk and visit the artifacts museum in the evening.
texts.text: WW1 Talk & Museum Visit : Attend the talk and visit the artifacts museum in the evening.

texts.text: Breakfast : Have breakfast upon returning to the resort.
